home.title: Practical guides on Google Shopping feed optimization
home.lead: Field-tested playbooks, deep dives and case studies to help your e-commerce store rank higher, convert better, and waste less ad spend.

newsletter.title: Get the weekly feed insights
newsletter.lead: Actionable Google Shopping optimization tips, every Tuesday. No spam.
newsletter.success: Thanks — check your inbox to confirm.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.about: AI-powered Google Shopping feed optimization for stores that want fewer disapprovals, better CTR, and more revenue per click.

exitPopup.title: Before you go — see what your feed is missing.
exitPopup.lead: Drop your Shopify URL. We score every product against Google's policy and the listings ranking above you, then send back a prioritised fix list.
exitPopup.meta: No signup. No credit card. ~60 seconds.

auditBanner.title: See what's costing you clicks.
auditBanner.lead: We score every product in your feed against Google's policy and the listings ranking above you in your category. You get back a prioritised fix list — titles, images, missing attributes — ranked by revenue impact.

auditPromo.title: Free Google Shopping audit
auditPromo.lead: Score every product in your feed against Google's policy and the listings ranking above you.
